reasoning: The FedRAMP control RA-5 (2) focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment and continuously monitored. This involves enabling image vulnerability scanning in registries, configuring admission controllers to enforce policies that prevent vulnerable images from being deployed, and ensuring that images are scanned upon admission to the cluster.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning | Update Vulnerabilities to Be Scanned
